caption:
[Term-px](//github.com/fenwick67/term-px) lets you turn images or image data into RGB or ANSI art for your terminal.  

![Demo](http://i.imgur.com/iwlN1Ru.gif)

It's written in Javascript, so you can use it with Node, *or* say, [use it to make a browser tool](//fenwick67.github.io/term-px).

You can try converting an image [here](//fenwick67.github.io/term-px).
title: Term-Px
